1.name: Green Slime
descriptions: A gelatinous organism of unstable structure.
It does not appear to act with intent — only reaction.

2.name: Blue Slime
descriptions: Its surface has hardened into crystalline ridges.
The fragments now move with delayed coordination.
Mutation suggests prolonged exposure to higher floors.

1.name: Hooded Cultist
descriptions: A devoted follower of something unseen.
Its chants appear to strengthen conviction more than flesh.

2.name: Zealous Cultist
descriptions: Faith has replaced hesitation.
The ritual scars on its skin glow faintly.
Belief seems to amplify physical resilience.

1.name: Faint Wisp
descriptions: A drifting mote of pale light.
It flickers when threatened, as if uncertain of its own existence.
It does not attack unless provoked.

2.name: Soul Wisp
descriptions: It appears to have taken on the shape of a soul.
Prolonged exposure to corpses and humans seems to grant it the ability to imitate others.
At times, it exhibits traits resembling specific faiths.

1.name: Dungeon Scavenger
descriptions: A creature shaped by scarcity.
It favors ambushes and appears to wait for weakness before committing to violence.

2.name: Carrion Stalker
descriptions: Its body has adapted to consume more than flesh.
It appears to scavenge more than sustenance — perhaps even knowledge — as if confused by what it absorbs.
There are indications it imitates or assumes identities.

1.name: Clay Golem
descriptions: Formed from packed earth and silent intent.
It moves slowly, but with unwavering purpose.

2.name: Runed Stone Golem
descriptions: Ancient symbols glow across its fractured surface.
Each strike produces sparks rather than dust.
The structure appears reinforced by something beyond stone.
